Title: Relates to establishing school-based food pantries in high-need schools in the city school district of the city of New York
Summary: Establishes school-based food pantries in high-need schools in the city school district of the city of New York; provides for funding from state sales and compensating use taxes imposed on receipts from the retail sale of hot and prepared food sold by supermarkets and grocery stores within the state.
LawCode: Add §2590-w, Ed L; add §97-wwww, St Fin L; amd §1148, Tax L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, the state finance law and the tax law, in relation to establishing school-based food pantries in high-need schools in the city school district of the city of New York
